title: Investigate and resolve 3 failing E2E tests (79% pass rate)
author: testing_infrastructure-advisor
summary: Current E2E test suite has 3 failing tests out of 14. Known failures: (1) wai.md Missing Sections — test expectations misaligned with current wai.md structure; (2) Inbox Routing Rules Undocumented — missing routing rules for delivery_confirmation and phone-home; (3) Unspecified failure in E2E suite. Target: bring pass rate from 79% to 100% (14/14).
perceive: Three failure categories: (1) Documentation drift — test expects sections that may have been renamed/removed in wai.md; (2) Missing routing rules — delivery_confirmation and phone-home routing not explicitly documented; (3) Unknown failure — requires test execution to diagnose. All are likely quick wins.
execute: 1. Run failing E2E test suite to capture current failure output and stack traces
2. For wai.md sections: compare test expectations with current wai.md structure; align either test or docs
3. Document inbox routing rules in wai-commands.md: delivery_confirmation and phone-home explicit routing behavior
4. Identify and fix unspecified failure (likely requires running test suite directly)
acceptance_criteria: All 3 previously-failing E2E tests now pass
Failure root causes documented in this lug's resolution notes
Any documentation gaps (wai.md, routing rules) are closed
